name: 父女隱秘關係
description: 女主與父親塔格利安公爵之間的特殊關係——父親常年不在身邊但暗中派人保護。婚禮上父親現身是終極身份揭露的關鍵，父愛的遲到與補償增添了情感深度。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: Well, my dad likes to disappear a lot. I guess he's out traveling the world, but he always sends people to watch over me when he's not around. / Dad, you promised. I You weren't going to go overboard. Like, I don't want to freak out my new husband. 200 unmanned planes. We'll make national headlines.
examples.context: 女主與父親塔格利安公爵之間的特殊關係——父親常年不在身邊但暗中派人保護。婚禮上父親現身是終極身份揭露的關鍵，父愛的遲到與補償增添了情感深度。
